tasks.label: git-unstage-temp
tasks.command: git restore --staged .agents/ls_files.txt brain_model_gb.pkl brain_model_rf.pkl brain_model_scaler.pkl phase1_cycle_code.txt phase1_cycle_err.txt phase1_cycle_out.txt phase1_probe_code.txt phase1_probe_err.txt phase1_probe_json.txt phase1_probe_out.txt phase2_compile_code.txt phase2_compile_err.txt phase2_compile_out.txt phase2_help_code.txt phase2_help_err.txt phase2_help_out.txt py_ok.txt testout.txt 2>&1; echo 'DONE_UNSTAGE'

tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command: git restore --staged .agents/ls_files.txt brain_model_gb.pkl brain_model_rf.pkl brain_model_scaler.pkl phase1_cycle_code.txt phase1_cycle_err.txt phase1_cycle_out.txt phase1_probe_code.txt phase1_probe_err.txt phase1_probe_json.txt phase1_probe_out.txt phase2_compile_code.txt phase2_compile_err.txt phase2_compile_out.txt phase2_help_code.txt phase2_help_err.txt phase2_help_out.txt py_ok.txt testout.txt 2>$null; git commit -m 'feat: scanner multiativos, autonomia adaptativa, news shadow mode e motor compartilhado'; git push; echo 'GIT_DONE'

tasks.label: check-git-tracked
tasks.command: git ls-files scripts/mt5_cmd_bot.py vuno_core/ vunotrader_brain.py && echo 'FILES_TRACKED' || echo 'FILES_NOT_TRACKED'

tasks.label: verify-tracked
tasks.command: git ls-files --error-unmatch scripts/mt5_cmd_bot.py vuno_core/__init__.py vunotrader_brain.py 2>&1 && echo 'ALL_TRACKED' ; git log --oneline -3 2>&1
